assignees: ''

<!-- Clear, one-sentence description of the bug -->

**Expected Behavior:**  
<!-- What should happen? -->

**Actual Behavior:**  
<!-- What actually happens? -->

## Reproduction Steps

1. <!-- First step -->
2. <!-- Second step -->
3. <!-- Additional steps... -->

**Minimal Reproduction:**  
<!-- If possible, provide the smallest code snippet or API request that reproduces the issue -->

```typescript
// Example code or API request
```

## Environment

**Component:**  
<!-- Select one: Frontend / Backend / Smart Contract / Deployment / Documentation -->

<!-- e.g., v1.2.3 or commit hash -->

<!-- Testnet / Mainnet / Local -->

**Browser (if frontend):**  
<!-- e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17 -->

**Wallet (if applicable):**  
<!-- e.g., Freighter 5.0.0, Rabet 2.1.0 -->

**Operating System:**  
<!-- e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 -->

## Additional Context

**Error Messages:**  
<!-- Paste any error messages, stack traces, or console output -->

```
Error logs here
```

**Screenshots:**  
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem -->

**Related Issues:**  
<!-- Link to related issues or PRs -->

**Workaround:**  
<!-- If you found a temporary workaround, describe it here -->

## Impact Assessment

**Severity:**  
<!-- Select one: Critical / High / Medium / Low -->

**Frequency:**  
<!-- How often does this occur? Always / Sometimes / Rarely -->

**User Impact:**  
<!-- Who is affected? All users / Specific wallet users / Admin only / etc. -->

**Blocking:**  
<!-- Does this prevent core functionality from working? Yes / No -->
